title: Vlorë, Vlorë — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Vlorë, Vlorë: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Vlorë is a city in Vlorë with a population of 79,000. A coastal city in southwestern Albania on the Adriatic and Ionian Seas, known for its beautiful beaches, the Independence Monument, and the Karaburun Peninsula.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
